summary: Kenya picked a Chinese firm for a $2.9 billion upgrade of its biggest airport, people with knowledge of the matter said, two years after a concession deal with Indian conglomerate Adani Group was canceled.

title: Banks Line Up €1.7 Billion Debt for Triton’s Flender Buyout
title_cn: 银行为 Triton 的 Flender 收购准备了 17 亿欧元的债务
summary: Deutsche Bank AG and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. are among banks that have lined up around €1.7 billion ($1.97 billion) of debt financing that will back Triton Partners’ acquisition of German gearbox-maker Flender GmbH.

title_cn: 随着美伊协议临近，股市进一步上涨：市场结束
summary: Stocks extended their rally while oil hit the lowest level in months following fresh evidence that the US and Iran are nearing a provisional agreement to end their war.

title: UK Power Prices Turn Negative as Renewables Set to Flood Grid
title_cn: 由于可再生能源将淹没电网，英国电价转为负数
summary: UK power prices turned negative for the first time since late April as strong wind and solar generation are set to flood the grid.

summary: ENN Natural Gas Co.’s board terminated a planned restructuring, including a nearly $12 billion buyout offer for ENN Energy Holdings Ltd. and a second listing in Hong Kong.

title: India Inflation Accelerates to 3.93%, Stays Below RBI Target
title_cn: 印度通胀率加速至 3.93%，仍低于印度央行目标
summary: India’s inflation accelerated in May but remained below the Reserve Bank of India’s 4% target, even as higher fuel costs stemming from disruptions in global energy markets added to price pressures.

title: EU’s Top Carmakers Unite to Push for ‘Made in Europe’ Plans
title_cn: 欧盟顶级汽车制造商联合推动“欧洲制造”计划
summary: Volkswagen AG, Stellantis NV and Renault SA are joining forces to push for regulation favoring automaking in Europe to help them compete with a surge of affordable cars from China.

title: SpaceX Poised to Pop After Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 有望在创纪录的 IPO 后大放异彩
summary: Shadow-market trading suggests a 35% gain for the shares.

title: Musk On Verge of Trillionaire Status With SpaceX IPO | The Opening Trade 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股，马斯克即将成为亿万富翁开盘交易 6/12/2026
summary:
SpaceX has made history with the biggest-ever IPO, sending it into the top ranks of the largest public companies and putting founder Elon Musk on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire. The company raised $75 billion in the IPO, ahead of its listing on the Nasdaq and Nasdaq Texas Friday on Friday.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Banks Court Wealthy Indian Diaspora in $50 Billion Deposit Drive
title_cn: 银行向印度侨民发起 500 亿美元存款活动
summary: After more than a decade, India is once again turning to its 35 million-strong diaspora for support. This time, banks are mounting a global campaign to attract more than $50 billion in deposits from overseas nationals as policymakers seek to bolster foreign exchange reserves and support a battered rupee.

title: Jakarta Police Clash With Students Protesting Prabowo Plans
title_cn: 雅加达警方与抗议普拉博沃计划的学生发生冲突
summary: Indonesian police clashed with students in central Jakarta Friday, trying to contain a protest against the rising cost of living and President Prabowo Subianto’s spending plans.

title: South Africa Treasury Says Upgrades Show Path to Investment Grade
title_cn: 南非财政部表示升级表明了投资级别的道路
summary: South Africa’s recent credit-rating upgrades are a strong endorsement of government policy and show the nation can restore its coveted investment-grade status if it stays on track, said the National Treasury chief.

title: European Bonds Surge as Trump Touts Progress on Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普吹捧伊朗协议取得进展，欧洲债券飙升
summary: European and US bonds rallied as the renewed potential for a peace deal in the Middle East drove down oil prices and eased concerns over quickening inflation.

title: Swiss Firms Expect Population Cap to Be Defanged, Lobby Says
title_cn: 游说团体称瑞士企业预计人口上限将被取消
summary: Swiss companies expect the government to water down the proposed population cap if voters back it, according to the country’s main business lobby.

title: ENN Is Said to Mull Dropping $12 Billion Energy Unit Buyout
title_cn: 据称新奥能源正在考虑放弃 120 亿美元的能源部门收购
summary: ENN Energy Holdings Ltd.’s biggest shareholder is considering abandoning a nearly $12 billion buyout offer for the Hong Kong-listed company, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Higher Costs for Plastics Used Everywhere Are Becoming Next Inflation Headache
title_cn: 各地使用的塑料成本上升正成为下一个令人头痛的通胀问题
summary: US plastic suppliers say they are running out of room to absorb high costs of raw materials, raising the prospect of price increases for consumer goods ranging from groceries to cars later this year.

title: Czech Central Bank Chief Says June Hike a ‘Real Possibility’
title_cn: 捷克央行行长表示六月加息是“真正的可能性”
summary: Czech central bank Governor Ales Michl said he sees a stronger argument to raise interest rates in June to contain inflationary pressures.

title: Deutsche Bank Is Arranging Debut SRT for Renewables Lender DKB
title_cn: 德意志银行正在为可再生能源贷款机构 DKB 安排首次 SRT
summary: Deutsche Kreditbank AG, one of Germany’s largest lenders to sustainability projects, is planning its debut transaction in the fast-growing market for significant risk transfers.

title: ECB Ready to Hike Again in July If Necessary, Nagel Says
title_cn: 内格尔表示，如有必要，欧洲央行准备在 7 月再次加息
summary: The European Central Bank is prepared to raise interest rates for a second straight meeting next month if the shock from the war in the Middle East requires it, according to Governing Council member Joachim Nagel.

title: Korea Pension Fund’s Pivot Amplified Stock Swings, Barclays Says
title_cn: 巴克莱表示，韩国养老基金的枢轴放大了股票波动
summary: A move by the National Pension Service to temporarily suspend portfolio rebalancing has fueled volatility in South Korea’s stock market and added pressure on the won, according to Barclays Plc.

title: Sleep Number Files for Bankruptcy Sale to Sleep Country Canada
title_cn: Sleep Number 申请破产出售给 Sleep Country Canada
summary: Mattress maker Sleep Number Corp. has agreed to merge with Sleep Country Canada through a court-supervised process after years of weak demand and mounting financial pressure.

title: Despite Rout, Indonesia's Danantara Wealth Fund Prices First Dollar Bond for Global Investors
title_cn: 尽管惨败，印度尼西亚达南塔拉财富基金仍为全球投资者定价第一美元债券
summary: Indonesian sovereign wealth fund Danantara raised $1.5 billion in a successful debut global dollar bond sale, offering relief to President Prabowo Subianto’s government as it seeks to regain investor confidence following a selloff in the nation’s assets.

title: China Credit Growth Tops Forecasts in Rebound From Lending Slump
title_cn: 中国信贷增长从贷款下滑中反弹超过预期
summary: China’s credit expansion held up better than expected in May, rebounding after a rare contraction in loans the previous month.

title: London's AI Ecosystem Never Better: ElevenLabs CEO
title_cn: ElevenLabs 首席执行官：伦敦的人工智能生态系统从未如此美好
summary:
ElevenLabs Chief Executive Officer Mati Staniszewski says a growing number of founders believe they can build global companies from Britain.
ElevenLabs, which uses AI to create a variety of realistic voices, is the UK's most valuable AI start-up at $11 billion.
Staniszewski spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie at London Tech Week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indian Developer Prestige Plans $6.3 Billion in Project Launches
title_cn: 印度开发商 Prestige 计划斥资 63 亿美元启动项目
summary: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd., which counts BlackRock Inc. and Vanguard Group Inc. among its investors, is targeting about 600 billion rupees ($6.3 billion) in estimated sales value for this financial year as the developer prepares to launch projects across the country, its billionaire founder said.

title: Korean Stocks Jump as Iran Deal Hopes Spark Chip Stock Rally
title_cn: 伊朗协议有望引发芯片股上涨，韩国股市上涨
summary: South Korean stocks jumped as investors piled back into the country’s chipmakers after President Donald Trump signaled a potential deal with Iran, boosting risk sentiment.

title: SpaceX Shares Indicated More Than 35% Higher on Gray Markets
title_cn: 灰色市场上 SpaceX 股价上涨逾 35%
summary: Pre-IPO trading in derivatives linked to SpaceX indicates a gain of anything between 30% and 50% for Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company as retail investors flock to the much anticipated listing.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊和平协议前景，金价持稳
summary: Gold steadied as traders weighed prospects for a long-awaited deal to end the US-Iran war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.

title: Latest AI Doomers Imagine How Europe ‘Slides Into Irrelevance’
title_cn: 最新的人工智能毁灭者想象欧洲如何“滑向无足轻重”
summary: Report urges ‘most ambitious’ effort to keep pace in the AI race

title: When Will the UK Have Its First £100 Billion Tech Firm?
title_cn: 英国何时会拥有第一家价值 1000 亿英镑的科技公司？
summary: James Wise, general partner at Balderton Capital, says the UK could soon have its first £100 billion tech company. Wise, who also serves as chair of the UK Government's Sovereign AI fund, says policymakers must work with investors to help British firms scale globally. He speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie at London Tech Week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Next US-China AI Battle Is Over Compute — and China Is Spending Big
title_cn: 中美下一场人工智能之战将围绕计算展开——中国正在投入巨资
summary: China bets $295 billion on AI backbone as US data center boom accelerates

title: Singapore Court Stays Order to Jail Byju’s Founder, Lawyer Says
title_cn: 律师称，新加坡法院暂缓监禁 Byju 创始人
summary: Singapore’s high court has granted a stay on a six-month jail term for the founder of failed Indian technology firm Byju’s, his law firm Lazareff Le Bars said.

title: Do Humanoid Robots Really Need Legs?
title_cn: 人形机器人真的需要腿吗？
summary: There’s a long-running disagreement among roboticists about whether wheeled robots make more sense than walking ones.

title: Former Investment Banker Debuts Low-Cost Video AI for India
title_cn: 前投资银行家在印度推出低成本视频人工智能
summary: A startup founded by a former banker has launched one of India’s first homegrown video AI platforms, wading into an arena dominated by US and Chinese services.

title: London's AI Boom | Bloomberg Tech: Europe 6/12/2026
title_cn: 伦敦的人工智能热潮 |彭博科技：欧洲 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary:
In this episode of Bloomberg Tech: Europe, Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie dives into London's AI boom. The UK capital is on a tear, with Britain leading the AI wave in Europe, so what's behind the explosive growth and how did London become a global center for artificial intelligence? Bloomberg speaks to key players, including the co-Founder of ElevenLabs - the UK's most valuable AI start-up.

"Bloomberg Tech: Europe" spotlights the biggest names and trends shaping the region's technology ecosystem as the global competition heats up. This monthly, 30-minute magazine-style show features in-depth interviews with top technology leaders, as well as major investors and policymakers - giving you a compelling A to Z of the most consequential innovations, opportunities and challenges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Shows Willingness to Finance AI, Waldron Says
title_cn: 沃尔德伦表示 SpaceX IPO 显示了为人工智能融资的意愿
summary: John Waldron, Goldman Sachs president and chief operating officer discusses SpaceX's record IPO and whether markets can absorb two other possible big IPOs by the end of the year. "Capital markets are demonstrating a willingness to finance these extraordinary companies as we build out this AI infrastructure," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Waldron Says SpaceX Shows Investor Zeal for Funding AI
title_cn: 高盛的 Waldron 表示 SpaceX 显示了投资者对资助人工智能的热情
summary: SpaceX’s record-setting initial public offering shows investors are eager to finance artificial intelligence infrastructure, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc. President John Waldron.

title: Tech Secretary Vows More Help for UK AI Sector
title_cn: 技术大臣誓言为英国人工智能行业提供更多帮助
summary: Technology Secretary Liz Kendall says the UK’s Labour government will strengthen efforts to drive institutional funds into British tech companies, as she pledged more backing for the country’s artificial intelligence sector. Speaking to Bloomberg TV during London Tech Week, Kendall said she wants The government wants to unlock investment into UK firms with legal reforms to how pension funds are run. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Needs More Affordable Power Plants To Drive AI: Miller
title_cn: 英国需要更经济实惠的发电厂来推动人工智能：米勒
summary:
Evantic Capital Founder and Managing Partner Matt Miller says the UK needs to invest in more affordable power plants, including nuclear energy, to boost the the country's AI sector.
Miller is a former partner at Sequoia Capital who last year founded Evantic, a 400 million dollar UK-based venture capital fund. Miller spoke to Tom Mackenzie on Bloomberg Tech: Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Scammers Used Gemini AI to Help Build Spam Messages, Google Says
title_cn: 谷歌称诈骗者利用 Gemini AI 帮助构建垃圾邮件
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google filed a lawsuit against a suspected Chinese cybercrime operation, alleging that the group used artificial intelligence to send more than 2 million text messages with fraudulent links attempting to scam cellphone users.

title: How a Vibecoded Newsletter Is Making the Hay Market More Transparent
title_cn: Vibecoded 时事通讯如何使干草市场更加透明
summary: A conversation with HayWire's Aiden Johnson.

title: Odd Lots: Making the Hay Market More Transparent (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的地段：让干草市场更加透明（播客）
summary: The hay market is not a transparent market: It is very fractured by types of hay, whether it is alfalfa or clover hay. There are a few opaque, illiquid markets like this — scrap metal for instance — that require some hands-on investigating to figure out. Aiden Johnson is co-founder and CEO of the HayWire newsletter, which aims to make the hay market more transparent: He and co-founder Cole Glasgow use an AI model to mine public data sources — like USDA reports on auction prices across different

title: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Executives Plan to Attend G7 Summit
title_cn: Anthropic、OpenAI、谷歌高管计划出席 G7 峰会
summary: Artificial intelligence executives from Anthropic PBC, OpenAI and Alphabet Inc.’s Google are slated to attend the Group of Seven summit, a gathering of world leaders that gets underway next week in France.

title: UK Tech Secretary Vows More Action on Pushing Funds to Startups
title_cn: 英国科技大臣誓言采取更多行动向初创企业提供资金
summary: The UK’s Labour government will strengthen efforts to drive institutional funds into British tech companies, Technology Secretary Liz Kendall said, as she pledged more backing for the country’s artificial intelligence sector.

title: SpaceX’s $100 Billion Order Book Is Tiny Versus Hot Chinese IPOs
title_cn: SpaceX 的 1000 亿美元订单与中国热门 IPO 相比微不足道
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX made history with the biggest initial public offering of all time, but there’s at least one metric where the deal falls short.

title: Kioxia Becomes Japan’s Most Valuable Firm as AI Mania Goes On
title_cn: 随着人工智能热潮的持续，铠侠成为日本最有价值的公司
summary: Memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp. replaced Toyota Motor Corp. to become Japan’s largest company by market value, underscoring how the global artificial intelligence boom is reshaping the country’s corporate landscape.

title: SpaceX Governance Standards Too Weak: Danish Pension CIO
title_cn: SpaceX 治理标准太弱：丹麦养老金首席信息官
summary: Anders Schelde, chief investment officer of AkademikerPension, a $25 billion Danish pension fund, explains his concerns about SpaceX's valuation and governance structure. Speaking from Copenhagen on Bloomberg Television, Schelde says the risk of a sharp repricing is "definitely on the table." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Banks Curb Hedge Fund Bets on SK Hynix, Samsung After Rally
title_cn: 反弹后银行限制对冲基金押注 SK 海力士和三星
summary: Global banks are curbing hedge funds’ leveraged bets on Asia’s top chipmakers including SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. after a blistering rally this year raised concerns of a potential pullback, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Makes History With Biggest-Ever IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 创造历史最大规模 IPO
summary: SpaceX raised $75 billion in its IPO, pricing 555.6 million shares at $135 each, sending it into the top ranks of the largest public companies and putting founder Elon Musk on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham breaks down the situation and what to expect from SpaceX's first day of trading. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba Bids $1.5 Billion for China Grocer in Meituan Fight
title_cn: 阿里巴巴出价 15 亿美元收购中国杂货商 打响美团大战
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. is offering $1.5 billion to buy Chinese grocery delivery firm Pupu, initiating a bidding war as part of a broader campaign to wrest market share from online commerce rival Meituan.

title: SpaceX Raises $2.2 Billion in Japan Slice of Record-Breaking IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在日本筹集 22 亿美元创纪录的 IPO
summary: SpaceX raised $2.2 billion from Japanese investors, according to a regulatory filing on Friday, as part of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

title: RLRWLD CEO on Nvidia Partnership, DexBench
title_cn: RLRWLD 首席执行官谈 Nvidia 合作伙伴关系、DexBench
summary:
Junghee Ryu, Founder and CEO of South Korean robotics startup, RLWRLD, discusses the company's partnership with Nvidia to build a universal benchmark for evaluating how well robots use their hands to manipulate objects and complete tasks. The company is aiming to develop next-generation industry standards for humanoid robotics.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's Regulatory Ceasefire Is Over, Gavekal Says
title_cn: 加韦卡尔表示，中国的监管停火已经结束
summary: Tilly Zhang, China technology and industrial policy analyst at Gavekal Dragonomics, says Beijing's latest regulatory actions differ from its 2021 campaign, with greater emphasis on law enforcement. The market regulator had summoned Alibaba, JD.com and other e-commerce players for allegedly misleading promotions, its latest warning against unchecked competition in the online arena. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Sparks Job Loss Worries in China, Call for Protection
title_cn: 人工智能引发中国失业担忧，呼吁保护
summary: China’s rapid adoption of AI in the workplace has prompted an unusually blunt call from a state-run newspaper. The Workers' Daily, the official paper of China’s umbrella trade union organization, called on regulators to protect labor rights as officials consider how to contain risks posed by the new technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Robot Appliance Maker Dreame Tech Is Said to Consider IPO in Hong Kong
title_cn: 据称，中国机器人家电制造商梦想科技考虑在香港首次公开募股
summary: Dreame Technology, a Chinese maker of robotic vacuum cleaners and other smart home appliances, is considering a Hong Kong initial public offering as soon as next year, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Trump, Modi Look to Repair Ties in Shadow of New US Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪希望在美国新一轮打击的阴影下修复关系
summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war.

title: India Summons US Diplomat Second Time Over Gulf Ship Strikes
title_cn: 印度因海湾船只袭击事件第二次传唤美国外交官
summary: India’s government summoned a senior US diplomat for a second time this week to protest US strikes on vessels carrying Indian crew members in the Gulf of Oman.

title: NATO Winding Down Its Kosovo Mission Due to Improved Security
title_cn: 由于安全局势改善，北约结束了在科索沃的任务
summary: NATO will reduce its military presence in Kosovo, marking a shift for a peacekeeping mission that has remained a cornerstone of stability in the Balkans since the 1999 war.

title: Sweden Says Russia Could Seek to Test NATO in ‘Near Term’
title_cn: 瑞典称俄罗斯可能寻求在“近期”测试北约
summary: Sweden sees a possibility that Russia may seek to test NATO’s cohesion and its commitment to mutual defense through some kind of military attack in the “relatively near term.”

title: US and Iran Nearing a Peace Deal Around Next Week’s G7 Meeting
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在下周七国集团会议期间接近达成和平协议
summary: The US and Iran are moving closer to signing an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz that could potentially come as soon as Sunday with the Group of Seven world leaders set to meet next week. Abeer Abu Omar reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s UFC Bash Risks Alienating Voters
title_cn: 特朗普对UFC的猛烈抨击可能会疏远选民
summary: The president’s obsession with pet projects fuels arguments he lacks focus on pocketbook issues.

title: US and Iran Nearing a Peace Deal Around G7 Meeting Next Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗将在下周七国集团会议期间达成和平协议
summary: The US and Iran are edging closer to signing an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as the Group of Seven world leaders are set to meet next week, according to senior officials.

title: China Confirms Arrest of American Citizen on Spying Charges
title_cn: 中国证实以间谍罪逮捕一名美国公民
summary: Beijing confirmed the arrest of a US citizen on spy allegations, a move that may test a trade truce upheld at a recent summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

title: UK Defense Secretary’s Ugly Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy
title_cn: 英国防长丑陋的退出粉碎了斯塔默的遗产
summary: In a rousing speech in Munich in February, Keir Starmer vowed to “spend more, faster” to counter the threat from Russia. Four months later, his defense secretary quit over the embattled UK premier’s failure to follow through, destroying his best shot at a lasting legacy.

title: Trump Says Iran Deal in 'Coming Days' & SpaceX IPO Breaks Records | Daybreak Europe 6/12/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗协议将在“未来几天”达成且 SpaceX 首次公开募股将打破纪录黎明欧洲 6/12/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Brent crude fell below $90 a barrel after President Trump said a deal to end the war in Iran could be signed as soon as this weekend. The president said he had pulled back plans for a third day of military strikes on Iran, after the Supreme Leader agreed to a deal. But Iran's semi-official Fars news agency says nothing has been approved yet.

And SpaceX has made history with its $75 billion IPO, with a market value of $1.7 trillion ahead of its first day of trading.

Today's guest: Anders Schelde, AkademikerPension, CIO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Stocks Rise as Trump’s Iran Deal Comments Lift Sentiment
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议评论提振市场情绪，日本股市上涨
summary: Japanese equities rallied after US President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to signing a deal with Iran, fueling expectations that the Middle East conflict is nearing an end.

title: What to Know as the Swiss Prepare to Vote on a 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 瑞士准备就 1000 万人口上限进行投票时需要了解什么
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland is set to vote on a proposal that would take things to the next level: a 10 million cap on its population.

title: Russians Told There’s Enough Gasoline as Drone War Hits Supply
title_cn: 无人机战争影响供应，俄罗斯人告诉他们有足够的汽油
summary: Russia’s regional authorities are scrambling to dispel concerns about a gasoline crunch in the wake of Ukrainian strikes on oil infrastructure that sparked reports of shortages at some filling stations.

title: Gary Lineker: The World Cup, Trump and FIFA
title_cn: 加里·莱因克尔：世界杯、特朗普和国际足联
summary: For decades, Gary Lineker anchored live sporting events for the BBC. Now he’s a podcaster. In this conversation, he talks about his new Netflix show and his hopes for an England World Cup win. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia’s ‘Free-for-All’ Election Season Set For July Open
title_cn: 马来西亚“混战”选举季将于七月开幕
summary: The loose coalitions that rule Malaysia are starting to fray as the next election season heats up, opening up a multifront challenge for Anwar Ibrahim to maintain his premiership.

title: Ukraine’s AI Drones Have Given Kyiv a Fresh Edge on Battlefield
title_cn: 乌克兰的人工智能无人机为基辅战场带来了新的优势
summary: Waves of AI-guided drones are hammering Russian supply lines in occupied Ukraine as Kyiv seeks to capitalize on its latest advances in technology and tactics.

title: Iran’s Oil Lifeline Faces ‘Biggest Test Yet’ as China Steps Back
title_cn: 随着中国的退出，伊朗的石油生命线面临“迄今为止最大的考验”
summary: Iranian oil shipments to China, a resilient trade that’s survived years of US sanctions to provide a crucial economic lifeline to Tehran, is coming under huge strain from waning demand and an American blockade.

title: Carney’s Middle Powers Race to Thwart US-China Dominance of AI
title_cn: 卡尼的中等强国竞相阻止中美在人工智能领域的主导地位
summary: A survey of government AI strategies in three continents shows a determination not to allow Washington and Beijing to dictate the future alone.

title: Bad Bunny’s Sold-Out Shows Illuminate Spain’s New Lifeline: Immigrants
title_cn: 《坏兔子》售空的演出照亮了西班牙的新生命线：移民
summary: In the past three years, the country has welcomed more than 3 million arrivals, many from Latin America. They’ve helped transform Spain into the fastest-expanding major economy in the euro zone.

title: Trump Insists Iran Deal Is Close After Scrapping New Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普坚称伊朗协议在取消新的打击后即将达成
summary: President Donald Trump pulled back threatened military strikes against Iran, a stark reversal that came just hours after he vowed to hit the Islamic Republic “VERY HARD” and threatened to seize its oil infrastructure.

title: China Escalates Feud With Philippines by Banning Defense Chief
title_cn: 中国禁止国防部长加剧与菲律宾的不和
summary: China imposed sanctions on Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro, accusing him of making remarks that damaged bilateral ties and raising tensions in a relationship already strained by territorial disputes.

title: South Korea’s Ex-Leader Convicted Over Drones Sent to Pyongyang
title_cn: 韩国前领导人因向平壤运送无人机而被定罪
summary: A Seoul court found former South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol guilty of sending drones to Pyongyang to provoke a military confrontation with North Korea meant to create grounds for declaring martial law in 2024.

title: Taiwan’s Ties With Eastern Europe Buckle Under China Pressure
title_cn: 台湾与东欧的关系在中国压力下破裂
summary: The “Dumpling Alliance” burst to life during Covid, a nifty description for an informal collective of Eastern European states supporting Taiwan. Just a few years later, it’s hard to find a mention of it anywhere.

title: China Confronts G7 During Macron’s Call by Defending Free Trade
title_cn: 马克龙呼吁中国捍卫自由贸易对抗七国集团
summary: Chinese Vice Premier Zhang Guoqing made a case for the benefits of free trade during a video call Thursday with Group of Seven countries, as Beijing faces questions over its role in contributing to global economic imbalances.

title: South Korean Leader’s Support Slides to Six-Month Low After Vote
title_cn: 投票后韩国领导人的支持率跌至六个月低点
summary: The support rate for South Korean President Lee Jae Myung fell to a six-month low despite his party’s recent victories in local elections, as voters express frustration over ballot shortages reported at dozens of polling stations.

title: US Sees $13.7 Billion Bill to Boost F-35 Readiness, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国将拨款 137 亿美元加强 F-35 战备状态
summary: The Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps need to spend an additional $13.7 billion through 2031 to boost declining readiness rates of the F-35 jet, the world’s biggest weapons program, the Pentagon told congressional auditors.
